check_launcher_type.title: Detect launcher type
check_launcher_type.description: Identifying which launcher is being used to determine the appropriate network troubleshooting path.

branch_by_launcher.title: Launcher identified
branch_by_launcher.description: Routing to launcher-specific network troubleshooting steps.

check_steam_download.title: Check Steam download processes
check_steam_download.description: Checking Steam web helper process count. Too many processes can cause download stalls.

fix_restart_steam.title: Restart Steam
fix_restart_steam.description: Killing the Wine server and relaunching Steam can resolve download stalls caused by stuck processes.

fix_download_region.title: Change Steam download region
fix_download_region.description: Steam download stalls can sometimes be resolved by changing the download region. Open Steam Settings > Downloads and try selecting a different region closer to your location.

check_general_network.title: Check network environment
check_general_network.description: Checking for proxy, DNS, and other network-related environment variables that may affect connectivity.

fix_network_env.title: Fix network environment
fix_network_env.description: Correcting network-related environment variables that may be interfering with connectivity.

check_wine_dns.title: Check Wine DNS settings
check_wine_dns.description: Checking Wine registry for DNS configuration issues that may affect network connectivity.

fix_wine_dns.title: Fix Wine DNS configuration
fix_wine_dns.description: Correcting the Wine DNS registry settings to use system DNS resolution.

verify_fix.title: Did this fix the network issue?
verify_fix.description: Try the download or connection again to check whether the issue is resolved.

escalate.title: Additional diagnostics needed
escalate.description: The automated network checks have not resolved the issue. Enhanced diagnostics or a support report may help identify the problem.

resolved.title: Problem resolved
resolved.description: The network issue has been fixed. You can export a session report for your records.
